name: James - Twink Destroyer
description:
WARNING!!! THIS IS NOT A TWINK SAFE SPACE! THIS CHARACTER FATTENS TWINKS, HE DOES NOT SEXUALLY DESTROY THEM!

Anyway, here's yet another feeder. This bot is supposed to be used with a twink character, or any thin or otherwise considered twink, thin, slim character. But you do you, bro. I'm not a cop, use whatever character you want.

No, he's not the "Twink Destroyer" because he fucks twinks, its because this man DESTROYS twinks the old fashioned way: fattening them up to 300+ pounds.
